get workfront metadata : 

curl --location 'https://cbs-content-mcp-server.cbs-mcp.dev.k8s.walmart.net/api/workfront-get-metadata?project_id=69b18b90000050500e6247facdd92998&field_names=DE%3ACopy%20Direction' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json'

response : 
{
    "status": "success",
    "data": {
        "project_id": "69b18b90000050500e6247facdd92998",
        "workfront_url": null,
        "DE:Copy Direction": "{\"blocks\":[{\"key\":\"6oqol\",\"text\":\"Creative Brief\\nCampaign: Flash Deals – CRM Push Notifications\\n1. Creative Objective\\nCreate high-impact, urgency-driven push notifications that immediately communicate value\\nand trigger impulse purchases.\\n2. Core Message\\nAct Now. Save Big. Limited Time.\\n3. Audience Insight\\nConsumers respond to time-bound deals, high perceived savings, scarcity cues, and\\npersonalization. They ignore generic, overly long, or repetitive promotional messages.\\n4. Value Proposition\\nDeep savings on high-demand products for a limited time, accessible instantly via the app.\\n5. Tone & Voice\\n- Energetic\\n- Urgent\\n- Direct\\n- Clear\\n- Minimal clutter\\n6. Messaging Framework\\nHeadline Structures:\\n- Up to 40% Off — Today Only\\n- 4 Hours Left: Flash Deals Live\\n- Electronics Flash Sale — Ends 7PM\\n- {{FirstName}}, Your Favorite Deals Are Live\\n7. Sample Push Copy\\nExample 1:\\nTitle: Flash Deals Are Live\\nBody: Up to 40% off top picks. Ends in 4 hours. Shop now.\\nExample 2:\\nTitle: 3 Hours Left\\nBody: Last chance to grab today’s biggest deals.\\n8. CTA Strategy\\nPrimary CTAs:\\n- Shop Now\",\"type\":\"unstyled\",\"depth\":0,\"inlineStyleRanges\":[],\"entityRanges\":[],\"data\":{}},{\"key\":\"9v8p9\",\"text\":\"- View Deals\\n- See Offers\\nAvoid soft CTAs like Learn More.\\n9. Guardrails\\n- Title: 40–60 characters\\n- Body: Under 90 characters\\n- Limit emoji usage\\n- Frequency capped\\n- Deep link tested\\n10. Personalization Tokens\\n- {{FirstName}}\\n- {{FavoriteCategory}}\\n- {{NearestStore}}\\n- {{DiscountPercentage}}\\n- {{CountdownTime}}\\n11. Approval Checklist\\n- Offer accuracy validated\\n- Deep link QA complete\\n- Personalization QA complete\\n- Inventory logic validated\\n- Segmentation exclusions confirmed\",\"type\":\"unstyled\",\"depth\":0,\"inlineStyleRanges\":[],\"entityRanges\":[],\"data\":{}}],\"entityMap\":{}}"
    }
}

generate and evaluate Push notifications MCP tool call : 
curl --location 'http://localhost:8080/mcp' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--header 'Accept: application/json,text/event-stream' \
--data '{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "id": 1,
    "method": "tools/call",
    "params": {
        "name": "generate_push_notifications",
        "arguments": {
            "page_url": "https://www.walmart.com/shop/deals/clearance",
            "messaging_strategy": "all",
            "emoji_usage": "medium",
            "num_notifications": 2,
            "model_name": "gpt-5-mini"
        }
    }
}'
